content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Finished process_priority feature. Editor.__init__ gained process_priority: str|None=None param; edit_file() now builds popen_kwargs (creationflags on Windows via _PRIORITY_TO_WIN32_CREATIONFLAG, preexec_fn os.nice() on POSIX via _PRIORITY_TO_NICE_VALUE), with fallback to plain Popen call if the priority-augmented Popen raises OSError. Invalid/unmapped priority strings are silently ignored (dict.get returns None -> no kwargs added). termui.edit() gained a trailing process_priority: str|None=None param threaded into the Editor(...) constructor call, plus a docstring entry. I did not touch your filename/edit_files multi-file logic. Writing patch.txt now.
